label: I-95 Virginia (Fredericksburg / Stafford)
source: ITS Virginia I-95 corridor · TMC 15-min speeds (INRIX/RITIS via USDOT JPO CodeHub) to GMNS. Public sample.

narration.text: Corridor near free-flow (~94% of the peak reference speed). Detectors nominal; no active TIM.
Speed breaks down at 10:30 — capacity drop / onset of congestion. A recurrent queue forms; the red front propagates upstream (a shockwave moving against traffic).

Worst at 13:15 — corridor at ~68% of reference (bottleneck links far lower). Queue spillback extends upstream; secondary-crash risk window open. Candidate response: VSL harmonization, ramp metering, DMS diversion.
Speed recovers by 18:00 — queue discharges, shockwave clears. Roadway clearance complete; confirm MOEs (TTI, delay) return to baseline.
